social.post.description: Social media post — supports draft, scheduled, posted, failed states

social.account.description: Social media account linked to a platform and company

ai.agent.description: AI agent — LLM-powered content generator with sources and topics

ai.topic.description: AI topic with instructions and linked server action tools

ai.agent.source.description: Web source or document attached to an AI agent as knowledge

ai.composer.description: AI composer configuration — system prompts for quick actions

mail.activity.description: Activity/task on a record — used for review workflow
mail.activity.note: state field is computed (not stored) — cannot be used in domain filters

mail.activity.type.description: Activity type definition — defines review behavior

base.automation.description: Automated action rule triggered on model events

ir.actions.server.description: Server action — runs Python code on records
ir.actions.server.note: Set use_in_ai=True and ai_tool_description to make it available as AI tool

ir.cron.description: Scheduled action — runs on timer interval
ir.cron.note: Odoo 19: no numbercall field. Use state='code' with code field. model_id may be required.

res.company.description: Company record — linked to social accounts and partner for brand notes

res.partner.description: Partner/contact — comment field stores brand guidelines in HTML

utm.source.description: UTM source for campaign attribution tracking

ir.attachment.description: File attachment — stores images for social media posts
ir.attachment.note: Odoo 19: no datas_fname field. Use store_fname instead.

social_publish.name: Social: Publish Scheduled Posts
social_publish.purpose: Built-in cron that publishes due social.post records. Created automatically with social module.

ai_daily_pipeline.name: Pattern: AI Social News: Dynamic Post at {time}
ai_daily_pipeline.purpose: Triggers the AI social posting pipeline for all companies with active accounts

main_pipeline.name: Pattern: AI Social News: Dynamic Multi-Company
main_pipeline.purpose: Main pipeline: discover companies with accounts → read partner brand notes → detect industry → search web → create draft post → create review activity → send email notification

finalize_activity.name: Pattern: Auto Schedule on Activity Done
finalize_activity.purpose: Triggered by automation rule when activity is marked Done. Reads activity.res_id (social.post) and schedules it.
finalize_activity.code_pattern: check activity.state == 'done' and activity.activity_type_id.id == review_type_id → schedule post

approve_schedule.name: Pattern: Approve and Schedule
approve_schedule.purpose: Manual action to schedule a draft post: changes state to scheduled with scheduled_date=now+1h

rewrite_ai.name: Pattern: Rewrite with AI
rewrite_ai.purpose: Regenerates post content via AI web search, updates message, keeps state=draft

schedule_on_review_done.name: Pattern: Social Post: Schedule on Review Done
schedule_on_review_done.purpose: When review activity is marked Done → auto-schedule the related social.post
schedule_on_review_done.note: Cannot filter on activity.state (computed field). Check conditions in server action code.

search_queries.sport: AI in sports technology latest news
search_queries.tech: latest AI technology news breakthroughs business

security_groups.social.group_social_user: Social Marketing User — can create and manage posts
security_groups.social.group_social_manager: Social Marketing Manager — full access to accounts and settings
